use_cases: Animated hero section headlines that type out on page load
Terminal-style text displays for developer tools or chat interfaces
Loading state messages with character-by-character reveal
Animated quotes or testimonials that cycle through text
Cinematic intro sequences for landing pages or video content
ai_summary: A typewriter text animation component that reveals text character-by-character with configurable typing speed, cursor blinking, deletion effects, and looping behavior using Framer Motion. Perfect for creating engaging hero text, terminal-style displays, or cinematic loading sequences with a clean, minimal aesthetic.
